zh.Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾
zh.Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾哈姆斯塔爾 利德瓦雷
zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness Cecily Dutton於1395年出生在英國斯塔福爾哈姆斯塔爾 利德瓦雷時，她的父親Lord Peter Dutton28歲，母親Mrs. Peter Dutton26歲。她於1409年與Sir Hugh Venables在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1435年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾享年40歲。

zh-hans.Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾
zh-hans.Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾哈姆斯塔爾 利德瓦雷
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baroness Cecily Dutton于1395年出生在英国斯塔福爾哈姆斯塔爾 利德瓦雷时，她的父亲Lord Peter Dutton28岁，母亲Mrs. Peter Dutton26岁。她于1409年与Sir Hugh Venables在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1435年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness Cecily Dutton was born in 1395, in Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, England, her father, Lord Peter Dutton, was 28 and her mother, Mrs. Peter Dutton, was 26. She married Sir Hugh Venables in 1409, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1435, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baroness Cecily Dutton est née en 1395, à Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Peter Dutton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Peter Dutton, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh Venables en 1409, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1435, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baroness Cecily Dutton 1395 in Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Peter Dutton 28 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Peter Dutton 26. Sie hat 1409 in Staffordshire, England Sir Hugh Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1435 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Cecily Dutton è nata il nel 1395 nel Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Lord Peter Dutton, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Peter Dutton, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Hugh Venables nel 1409, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1435, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Cecily Duttonが1395年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアハムスタル リドワーで生まれた時，父Lord Peter Duttonは28歳，母Mrs. Peter Duttonは26歳であった。1409年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでSir Hugh Venablesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1435年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Cecily Dutton(이)가 1395년 영국 스태퍼드실르 함스탤 리드워에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Peter Dutton(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Peter Dutton(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1409년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Sir Hugh Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Cecily Dutton nasceu em 1395, em Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Peter Dutton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Peter Dutton, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh Venables em 1409, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1435, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baroness Cecily Dutton родилась в 1395 г. в местности хамсталл ридвар, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Peter Dutton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Peter Dutton, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh Venables в 1409 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1435 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baroness Cecily Dutton nació en 1395, en Hamstall Ridware, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Peter Dutton, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs. Peter Dutton, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Hugh Venables en 1409, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1435, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
